{ img. cred | vlhtdupa on pinterest }

You and Jasper had pretty good chemistry. At least you thought you did, considering all the playful banter and borderline flirting between you. Sure, he'd always act like he was annoyed, but he didn't actually feel that way, right? That's when you started upping the ante, pulling all sorts of stunts just to tease and bug him; deliberately forgetting your calculator so he'd have to lend you his, paying for his lunches, tugging on his shirt, ruffling his hair. It was fun. Cute, even. But when you heard him actually talking shit about you with his buddies, the fun was officially over. Now you're ignoring him, and he can't stand it. He doesn't get what's changed, or what he's done. So when he finally spots you again at your friend's birthday party, he corners you for answers.
